channel.title: Cascade Components on Mizubikes
channel.description: Recent content in Cascade Components on Mizubikes

item.title: Cascade Components 156mm Mullet Link: More Travel, More Progression
item.description: Installing a Cascade Components 156mm mullet link on the Stumpjumper 15 Alloy, and the story of getting one made to fit an alloy frame.

item.title: Why I Chose the Stumpjumper 15 Alloy for My Trail Build
item.description: Part one of my Stumpjumper 15 Alloy build series: why an alloy frameset on sale beat a carbon build, and what the GENIE platform actually gets you.
